title: hub-v3 PR1: HubSource read abstraction over worktree files and object store
description: First PR of the hub v3 migration (.design/hub-v3-per-agent-refs.md, REQ-3). Introduce a HubSource trait that the materialization/reduction path reads through, with two impls: the current worktree-file reader and a git object-store reader (cat-file against refs). Proves the existing compaction reducer produces identical state from both sources before any write-path changes. Acceptance: reducer parity test over a populated hub via both impls; no behavior change for users.
